englishDefinitions: A humorous way to say that an actor or role is so emotionally difficult that it could cause stress or trauma.
To make actors deal with intense emotional strain through a role or performance.
persianTranslation: بازیگرانم را از نظر روحی به هم ریختن
آن‌قدر نقش سختی دادن که درمان روانی لازم شود
examples: The script was so dark it would put my actors in psychotherapy.
That character would put any actor in psychotherapy.
He joked that the role might put his actors in psychotherapy.
